verdict_reason: New btnAmend method correctly implements semantic accessibility locators and follows naming patterns, but notificationCard.actions object should be updated for API consistency with copyAsNew.

todos.issue: notificationCard.actions is missing amend action. The notificationCard.actions object includes copyAsNew and view, but the newly-added btnAmend should also be exposed here for API consistency and discoverability.
todos.fix: Add 'amend: card.getByRole("button", { name: /Amend/ })' to the actions object in notificationCard() method (line ~158)
